title: zero-downtime rollouts via emptyDir + RollingUpdate
description:
## Summary
- Eliminates the ~60s 503 window on every website rollout (the cause of T000287 + T000288).
- Drops `evidence-pvc` (RWO Longhorn/local-path) and mounts `/var/evidence` as `emptyDir` — content is throwaway rrweb test artifacts that the `systemtest-cleanup` CronJob GC's anyway.
- Switches Deployment strategy from `Recreate` to `RollingUpdate` `maxSurge: 1, maxUnavailable: 0`, so a ready pod always serves traffic during deploys.

## Why
On `:latest`-pull rollouts, `Recreate` + RWO PVC killed the only pod first, then waited ~55s for the new pod's image pull before serving again. With ~8 deploys/day, that added up. Gekko hit one window at 06:28 UTC and filed two bug tickets describing the result ("Dashboard öffnet sich nicht mehr" / "Fehlermeldung am Kopf").

## Test plan
- [x] `task workspace:validate` passes
- [x] Live-verified zero downtime on mentolder during direct apply: 200 across the full rollout window, new pod entered EndpointSlice before old terminated
- [ ] After merge: run `task website:deploy ENV=mentolder` and `ENV=korczewski`, watch `/api/health` polling stay at 200 across the rollout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
